name: Wood Base with Rattan Shade Accent Table Lamp - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Bring the vintage era to life in your home by lighting up the space with the Wood Base with Rattan Shade Accent Table Lamp from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This accent table lamp features a brown orb-like wooden base that complements the rattan drum-shaped shade for a gorgeous look you'll love. Designed with a one-way on and off light setting, this table lamp has a base turn knob rotary switch for easy operation.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
